name: Click in Place 10qt Clear Plastic Storage Bin with White Latch for Home and Office Organization - Brightroom™​
description:
Optimize your home storage with the help of this 10-Quart Bin from Brightroom™. Featuring a stackable design for compact spaces, this polypropylene bin features a spacious design for storing anything from files to books to everyday necessities and beyond. The open top allows easy access to the contents, and side latches help keep the contents safe inside. Designed in a rectangular shape, this storage bin is white in hue and has a capacity of 10 quarts for ample storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
